hero.subtitle: Outlay keeps every subscription in one view, counts down each renewal, and warns you before money leaves your account — so nothing bills you by surprise.

mock.renewsIn: renews in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} · {date}

features.heading: Built to make recurring spend impossible to ignore.

see.title: See every subscription in one place
see.body: From streaming to software to that gym app you forgot about — every recurring charge lands on one calm dashboard. Nothing hidden, nothing slipping through.

notify.title: Get notified before you're charged
notify.body: A heads-up lands in time to cancel, pause, or plan — never the morning after.
notify.alert: {name} renews in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} — {price}

hikes.title: Catch price hikes early
hikes.body: Outlay flags the moment a subscription quietly raises its price.

spend.title: Know exactly what you're spending, every month
spend.body: One clear monthly total, broken down per subscription and trended over time. The true cost of your recurring spend, never a surprise.

how.heading: Three steps to never being surprised by a renewal.
how.step1Body: Enter the services you pay for — name, price, and billing cycle. Bulk-add the obvious ones in seconds.
how.step2Body: We keep each renewal date in view and quietly count down to the next charge across all your subscriptions.
how.step3Title: Get a heads-up before you pay
how.step3Body: A timely notification lands before each renewal — cancel, pause, or plan around it before the money moves.

free.heading: Free to use. Every feature included.
free.body: outlay is completely free — no plans, no card, no limits. Track everything from day one.

cta.heading: Take control of your recurring spend.
cta.body: See every subscription, catch every renewal, and stop paying for things you forgot about.

footer.tagline: Every recurring charge, always visible. Get product updates as we ship.
footer.madeFor: Made for people who hate surprise charges.

newsletter.helper: Product updates. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.error: Please enter a valid email address.
